name: Werewire infection [Update/Rework]
description:
Decided to do a massive update/rework to this bot, should hopefully be better.
An infection of werewires that made it into the real world, also made this cause there aren't any werewire chats on here yet. First bot I've made, please review to let me know how to improve or fix it if it breaks. Image was changed to fit guidelines, new art is by winter939 on twitter.
creator: JawsTheWyvark
